name: Cloud Services for Energy Utilities
positioning: NIS2-ready cloud transformation for critical energy infrastructure

tiers.name: Compliance & Readiness Assessment
tiers.scope: NIS2 compliance gap assessment with sovereign cloud architecture blueprint plus 5-workload pilot migration with parallel-run validation, 3-week delivery.

tiers.name: Sovereign Migration
tiers.scope: Single regulated workload domain migrated to BSI C5-ready sovereign cloud, up to 50 workloads, 12-week delivery.

tiers.name: Hybrid Cloud Transformation
tiers.scope: Multi-domain sovereign deployment with up to 200 workloads including SAP IS-U, multi-site OT/IT hybrid platform via MCCP, and managed operations across two hyperscalers with up to 300 instances, 18-week delivery.

tiers.name: Full Estate Cloud Transformation
tiers.scope: Enterprise-wide sovereign cloud with BaFin audit support, full estate migration of 500+ workloads across all application domains, enterprise-wide hybrid platform with full OT integration, and 24/7 managed operations across all three hyperscalers with dedicated CSM, 26-week delivery.
